title: contingency-dsl Core-Stateful AST
description: AST schema extension for the Core-Stateful layer. Schedules whose criteria are computed from runtime state. Additive to schema/core/ast.schema.json — does not modify existing Core definitions.

PercentileSchedule.description: Percentile schedule (Platt, 1973; Galbicka, 1994). Reinforces responses meeting a specified percentile of the subject's recent response distribution on a given dimension. Criterion = f(response_history), computed at runtime.

pctl_target.description: Response dimension to measure. IRT: inter-response time (Platt, 1973; Kuch & Platt, 1976). latency: response latency (Galbicka, 1988). duration: response duration (Galbicka, 1988). force: response force (Notterman & Mintz, 1965). rate: local response rate (Galbicka, 1994).

pctl_rank.description: Percentile threshold (0–100). Rank=50 is the median. Rank=0 reinforces all responses (CRF equivalent, linter warning). Rank=100 reinforces no responses (EXT equivalent, linter warning).

pctl_window.description: Number of recent responses used to compute the distribution. Default: 20 (Platt, 1973 recommendation). Linter warns if < 5 (PCTL_SMALL_WINDOW) or > 100 (PCTL_LARGE_WINDOW).

pctl_dir.description: Reinforcement direction. 'below': reinforce responses at or below the percentile threshold (e.g., shorter IRTs). 'above': reinforce responses at or above (e.g., longer durations, greater force). Default: 'below'.

CoreStatefulScheduleExpr.description: Union of all Core-Stateful schedule expressions. Additive to Core's ScheduleExpr oneOf.
